mapper.sql: id, username, nickname, mobile, email, remark, account_type, status, employment_status, offboarded_at, offboarded_by, offboard_reason
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_account WHERE employment_status = 'offboarded'<> 'offboarded' ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM user_account WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE user_account SET employment_status = 'offboarded', status = 0, offboarded_at = #{offboardedAt}, offboarded_by = #{offboardedBy}, offboard_reason = #{offboardReason} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_account SET employment_status = 'active', status = 1, offboarded_at = NULL, offboarded_by = NULL, offboard_reason = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket WHERE customer_id = #{userId} OR assigned_to = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consultation_session WHERE customer_id = #{userId} OR assigned_to = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_account SET offboarded_by = NULL WHERE offboarded_by = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM login_log WHERE login_name = (SELECT username FROM user_account WHERE id = #{userId} LIMIT 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_login_session SET session_status = 'revoked', revoked_at = #{revokedAt}, revoked_reason = 'user_offboarded' WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND session_status = 'active'
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, mobile, email FROM user_account WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
